---
title: "Tracking & Predicting Antisemitic and Anti-LGBTQ+ Hate Crimes in the United States"
author: "Emily Diamond & Marin Moore"
institute: "Dickinson College"
date: "2026-03-24"
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: xaringan-themer.css
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: "16:9"
---
```{r xaringan-themer, include=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(xaringanthemer)
style_mono_accent(
  base_color = "#50B4C8",
  link_color = "#50B4C8",
  header_font_google = google_font("Open Sans"),
  text_font_google   = google_font("Fira Mono"),
  code_font_google   = google_font("Fira Mono"),
  header_h1_font_size = "2.75rem",
  header_h2_font_size = "2rem",
  header_h3_font_size = "1.5rem",
  text_font_size = "1.5rem",
  padding = "0px 64px 16px 64px",
  header_background_padding = "4rem",
  table_border_color = "#FFFFFF"
)
```
# The FBI Hate Crimes Dataset

This dataset includes all hate crimes reported to the FBI from 1991 to 2024.

--

Features include:
- Geographic data (city, state, region)
- Offender data (count, age, race, ethnicity)
- Victim data (count, age, race, ethnicity)
- Incident data (offense type, bias type)

--

We selected only data from the years 2014 to 2024 to ensure relevance and to train a machine learning model on 10 years of data (2014-2023) and test it on the 2024 data. 

---
# Basic EDA

<center>
<img src="Presentation Images/AllCrimes2014-2024.png" style="width: 80%;" /> 
</center>

---
# Basic EDA

.pull-left[<center>
<img src="Presentation Images/Antisemitic2014-2024.png" style="width: 100%;" /> 
</center>]

.pull-right[<center>
<img src="Presentation Images/AntiLGBTQ2014-2024.png" style="width: 100%;" /> 
</center>]

---
class: inverse

<img src="Presentation Images/LGBTQbyGroup2014-2024.png" style="width: 100%;" />

---
# Basic EDA

<img src="Presentation Images/AllCrimesMap.png" style="width: 100%;" /> 

---
# Basic EDA

<img src="Presentation Images/AntisemiticMap.png" style="width: 100%;" /> 

---
# Basic EDA

<img src="Presentation Images/AntiLGBTQMap.png" style="width: 100%;" /> 

---
# The ADL Antisemitic Incidents Dataset

We pulled data from the past 10 years (2015-2025) from the Anti-Defamation League's Antisemitic Incidents Heat Map. 

--

Features include:
- Date/Year
- City/State/Location Type
- Type of Attack/Ideology

--

This dataset tracks antisemitic, white supremacist, and terrorist incidents only.

---
## Basic EDA

From the ADL dataset:
- Number of Antisemitic Incidents: 37,004
- Number of Anti-LGBTQ+ Incidents: 443
- Number of Antisemitic AND Anti-LGBTQ+ Incidents: 358
- Percent of Antisemitic Incidents that are Also Anti-LGBTQ+: 0.9675%
- Percent of Anti-LGBTQ+ Incidents that are Also Antisemitic: 80.81%

--

Because this data only reports antisemitic and white supremacist incidents, it only reports anti-LGBTQ+ incidents which also fall into those categories. So, there does appear to be a number of correlated incidents. 

---

## Future Directions

Further EDA & machine learning model to predict antisemitic or anti-LGBTQ+ hate crimes based on the state’s:
- Region
- Proportion of Jewish population
- Estimated proportion of LGBTQ+ population
- Level of hate crime protections
- Balance of pro- to anti-LGBTQ+ legislation
- Conservative/liberal balance
- Level of ethnic diversity
